accepted.bullet_text: [[mogis]] — corpus's clearest single-card expression of Mogis's transactional theology, per the [[mogis]] node's named archetype slot. The flavor text *"We offer to Mogis the blood of the weak, and in return he makes us strong"* is the sacrifice-for-power doctrine in its sharpest form: blood-tithe upward, martial-strength downward. The oracle text `{2}{B}, sacrifice a creature: draw a card` enacts the doctrine mechanically — the mechanic IS the doctrine. `[Scryfall flavor_text; cohort node body: "transactional theology rendered as card mechanic"]`
accepted.archetype_slot: corpus's clearest single-card expression of Mogis's transactional theology: sacrifice for power, blood-tithe upward for martial strength downward, mechanically enacted via {2}{B}, sacrifice a creature, draw a card
